Localization.Description: Attempt to use the CoercedPotato technique. Privilege escalation using the CoercedPotato technique allows attackers with the ImpersonatePrivilege privilege to escalate their privileges to the SYSTEM level. After that, attackers can use the compromised host to retrieve credentials of local users, and in some cases other users that accessed this host. This data will allow attackers to perform lateral movement in the infrastructure.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} used the CoercedPotato technique (executable file {object.process.parent.name}) to start process {object.process.name} with system privileges on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} failed to use the CoercedPotato technique (executable file {object.process.parent.name}) to start a process with system privileges on host {event_src.host}
